## BookYourTrades

BookYourTrades (https://bookyourtrades.com) is Canada's commercial trades directory.
It connects property owners, general contractors, and developers with verified
skilled-trade contractors across all Canadian provinces.

## What Data Is Available

- Contractor listings with company name, trade type, city, province, and contact info
- Contractor reviews and ratings submitted by past clients
- Trade categories (see below)
- Cities and provinces across Canada
- Job board listings for tradespeople seeking work
- Industry news and trades education articles

## Trade Categories Covered

Electrical, Plumbing, HVAC, Roofing, Framing, Drywall, Flooring, Painting,
Concrete, Masonry, Landscaping, Excavation, Welding, Insulation, Fire Protection,
Sheet Metal, Millwork, Glazing, Elevator, General Contracting

## Geographic Coverage

All Canadian provinces and territories:
Ontario (ON), British Columbia (BC), Alberta (AB), Saskatchewan (SK),
Manitoba (MB), Quebec (QC), Atlantic Provinces (NB, NS, PEI, NL),
and Northern Territories (YT, NT, NU)

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/careers         — Returns current job listings in JSON
- GET /api/news            — Returns latest industry news articles in JSON
- POST /api/scrape-companies — Internal use; triggers company data refresh (cron)

## How to Find a Contractor

Directory listings follow the URL pattern:
  https://bookyourtrades.com/directory/{provider-id}

Example: https://bookyourtrades.com/directory/r1

The main directory with search and filters:
  https://bookyourtrades.com/directory

## Request a Quote

Owners and GCs can submit an RFQ (Request for Quote) at:
  https://bookyourtrades.com/rfq

## Contact

hello@bookyourtrades.com

## Disclaimer

BookYourTrades is a directory service only. Contractors listed are independent
businesses. This site does not provide legal advice. Verify credentials and
licensing independently before hiring any contractor.
